sizing_rule.note: Scale equal-sized units with account growth: 2 units at $1,500+, 3 units at $5,000+, 4 units at $12,000+. Minimum unit size $1,200. Unit size = Account equity / number_of_units.

source_rule_text: Scale the number of equal-sized position units proportionally with account size, increasing unit count at defined capital thresholds to manage risk and optimize capital deployment.
